summary: The chapter opens with Nayun and Col Xeste splitting up at a masked ball in Paris, which is also attended by Yun Seung-Ah. The festive atmosphere quickly turns tense as a portal is artificially created by Djinns from the "Evil Society," who are targeting the mythic artifact known as Homer's Ring. Amidst this unfolding danger, Guildmaster Yoren is confronted by his Deputy Guildmaster, who reveals Yoren's disguise, hinting at a past betrayal before their argument is cut short by Carro.
key_moments: Nayun and Col Xeste split up at a masked ball in Paris to scout the area.
A portal appears, revealed to be created by Djinns of the "Evil Society" who are targeting the mythic artifact, Homer's Ring.
Guildmaster Yoren is confronted by his Deputy Guildmaster, whose argument about a past betrayal is interrupted by Carro.
